title: Senior SEO Specialist at Babyoye Global Group

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Babyoye Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Babyoye Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About Babyoye Global Group:
Babyoye Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Babyoye Global Group!
